understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to use the limited step budget to maneuver the currently selected piece (and, if needed, other selectable pieces) through the grid so that a selectable reaches a goal tile/area (+), likely completing the level when positioned on it.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE action attempts to shift the selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. If a pushable block is directly adjacent in that direction and there is space, it can be pushed along with the piece; otherwise movement can fail. Walls and boundaries can block movement, but their behavior may not be fully predictable from the heuristic blocked flags. Multiple selectable pieces may exist, and control can be switched by CLICKing the exact pixel/grid position of another selectable (matching the coordinates used by player.position and objects).
